title: Dino-Lite digital microscope – Diagnostics and detection techniques
subtitle: Dino Lite digital microscope - Diagnostics et techniques de détection
description: A guide to using the Dino-Lite digital microscope for diagnostic and detection applications in vegetable crop IPM. It details features such as up to 900× magnification, wireless streaming, and advanced imaging software to support farmers in identifying pests, diseases, and nutrient levels.
